title: The Epic of Keret: The Righteous King
description: King Keret loses his entire family, marches to siege a city to win a new bride, and faces a divine test of his righteousness.
introduction: King Keret loses his entire family, marches to siege a city to win a new bride, and faces a divine test of his righteousness.

translation.text: Keret the king, Keret the noble.
